name: Burst Fire
entries: A weapon with the Burst Fire property can make a normal single-target attack, or it can spray a 10-foot-cube area within normal range with shots. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC equal to 8 + your Proficiency Bonus + your Dexterity modifier) or take the weapon's normal damage. This action uses ten pieces of ammunition.
